## LibraryData.IEncryptionConfig.cryptoProvider property

The crypto provider to use for decryption. Use `nodeCryptoProvider` for Node.js or `BrowserCryptoProvider` for browsers.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly cryptoProvider: ICryptoProvider;
```
